info.title: Masumi as a Service API
info.description: The main API for the Masumi web app and integrations: agents, dashboard, activity, earnings, and payment-related actions when your account is set up for them. Veridian credential flows used by the app are not listed here. Some `/api/v1/*` routes may proxy to a linked payment service when configured; the server uses an exact path allowlist and those operations are not enumerated here — see product documentation.

apiKeyHeader.name: x-api-key
apiKeyHeader.description: Platform API key from **API Keys** in the app. Send only this header (no Bearer scheme in this spec).

get.description: Paginated list of the authenticated user’s agents. Supports filters (verification status, registration state, network, search).

401.description: Unauthorized — valid session or API key required

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient role or feature not enabled

post.description: Creates a new agent and begins on-platform registration.

schema.description: Registration payload — see app UI / types
